title: Whole colony fixation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1ant0","text":"This protocol has been successfully tested on Botrylloides diegensis and Ciona robusta.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":46,"length":22},{"style":"italic","offset":73,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"d2rdq","text":"Fixation is done in 50 mL Falcons for small (7.5 x 2.5 cm) microscopy glass slides. Solutions are thus detailed for 50 mL. Larger slides will need larger containers and hence higher volumes of solutions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3qvob","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2cmpq","text":"Reference for the anaesthesia: Eugenol, another way to anaesthetize ascidians","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":31,"length":46}],"data":{}},{"key":"2ahtg","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"D888D9B0623811EBAE730738BD6FD6C9","url":"https://www.mer-littoral.org/eugenol-ascidians-anaesthetic.pdf"}}}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"87bcq","text":"Note that PFA solution is toxic and has to be discarded in the non-halogenated waste.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":63,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text:
{"blocks":[{"key":"73d3q","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b5p84","text":"A cleaned Botrylloides colony to be fixed","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":10,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"digh2","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"6hsq8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bqicr","text":"2X Filtered Artificial Sea Water (FASW)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qhvo","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"aeum8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fsdbl","text":"Menthol crystals: typically 1-2 1mm crystals per colony ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c2b3h","text":"50X eugenol in FASW: 50 drops of eugenol (clove oil) in 1 L 1X FASW ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8qmq2","text":"Paraformaldehyde (PFA) powder (30525-89-4) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1j8c9","text":"10 M NaOH: 40g NaOH in 100 mL H2O ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":31,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7gdho","text":"1 N HCl: 8 mL 12 N (37%) HCl in 92 mL H2O ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":39,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"protocols","mutability":"","data":{"id":46661,"title":"Cleaning colonial ascidians","title_html":"

Artificial sea water

steps: Dilute 25 mL 2x ASW with 25 mL dH2O in a Falcon tube.
Transfer the colony to the filled Falcon.
Add menthol crystals (usually 1-2 per colony) to the ASW and close the container.
Leave the colony to anesthetize for 00:10:00 .
Shake the 50x eugenol stock hard to mix the oil well, it should turn cloudy.
Add 1 mL 50x eugenol to the colony's water and close the container.
Leave until total relaxation of the colony's siphons; around 00:10:00 .
Heat 25 mL dH2O in a beaker at 60 °C using a microwave.
Place the beaker on a stirring hot 60 °C plate in a fume hood.
Add 2 g of PFA (4 % final concentration) powder to the stirring water.
Wait for the powder to sink in the water (increase stirring if needed).
Add 10 Molarity (M) NaOH drop by drop until the solution clears.
Add 1 Molarity (M) HCl drop by drop until solution reaches pH 7.5-8.2.
Add 25 mL 2x FASW and cool at Room temperature .
Mix 50 mL 4 % PFA with 1 mL 50X eugenol in a Falcon tube.
Transfer the anesthetized colony to the fixative.
Colony should be fully relaxed, if not extend anesthesia or increase eugenol.
Fix Overnight over night at Room temperature
Rinse in 1x FASW.
Wash twice 00:30:00 in 1x FASW at Room temperature (under rocking if available).
Wash three times 02:00:00 in PBS (under rocking if available).
Keep in PBS at 4 °C .
creator: Marta Wawrzyniak
